untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'surprise events that contradict 2+ prior quarters of baseline behavior' — this requires historical regime analysis and multi-quarter comparison logic not expressible in single-bar indicator conditions. The 2.0σ deviation and 200% volume threshold can be approximated using price_pos_20 and vol_ratio_20, but the quarterly contradiction detection requires external event flagging or regime-shift detection unavailable in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Partial translation: Approximated 2.0σ deviation using price_pos_20 (distance from 20-day SMA as fraction of range; values <0 or >1 indicate 2σ extremes). Approximated >200% volume deviation using vol_ratio_20 >3.0. Context-dependent direction: entry conditions structured for both long (price oversold + high volume) and short (price overbought + high volume) scenarios. Position reduction (50%) and analysis hold should be implemented at execution layer. Surprise event detection requires manual/external flagging.
